/about.title: Livoria Studio — Visual Portfolio for Creators
/about.description: A minimal portfolio website designed for visual creators. Focused on projects, motion, and clean presentation for photographers and filmmakers.
h1: About Livoria - is a creative production studio focused on visual clarity, atmosphere, and meaning. We design cinematic experiences that feel intentional, refined, and emotionally grounded.
h2: Livoria began as an exploration of form, light, and movement.
p: What started as a small creative experiment evolved into a studio driven by intention and detail. Over time, our focus became clear: not just creating visuals that look strong, but crafting stories that feel right.  Every project is approached with restraint, precision, and respect for the idea behind it.
We’re honored to have our work recognized by leading industry platforms and creative communities.
Behind every frame at Amber is a team of storytellers, artists, and visual thinkers who care deeply about the craft of filmmaking.
